nodes.title: Update script to run multiple tests
Cleaned up branch structure before release PR
Two genetic tools assign all cells as `negative` with testing data
Update nf-core modules when PRs are merged
Remove underscores ('_') from HTO names in test data
Return a file instead of printing overview
Create an own module for saving AnnData and MuData
`ProcessCountMatrix()` removes `-1` from barcodes, causing unintended merge with bff results
HTO labels with ('_') are replaced with ('-') in `PREPROCESSING_FOR_HTODEMUX_MULTISEQ`
Test modules for `ext.args` and different inputs
Add ext.args to local hashing modules
Remove prettier failing in bff module
Souporcell clustering panicked at 'no entry found for key' for some samples
Souporcell fails due to bcftools not found
Error: HADGE:run_multi:gene_demultiplexing:variant_cellSNP:cellSNP (1): Not a valid path value: 'None'
Deconvolution with known SNPs per sample - vcf_donor vs vcf_mixed
An attempt to run hadge with Singularity containers
Issues with the containers for hash processing
Integration of genetic modules and donor matching
Add created modules to the pipeline
add conda channels for samtools, scanpy, muon
Some modifications made to Hadge that were esential for running large scale processing of Onek1k data
Fix bug when no hto or rna matrix is provided for summary
Fixes for Multi-sample, implementation of MuData and Docs for hashing
Fix bug when not generating anndata
add generate anndata option for all demultiplexing processes
